citation.description: McpConfig fields and coercer entries for all 6 auth keys

criteria.criterion: Flat auth_enabled/auth_strategies/auth_issuer_url/auth_resource_server_url/auth_required_scopes/auth_static_tokens_file keys exist as McpConfig fields + flat coercer entries, appear in MCP_ENV_VARS/server.json, and the regenerated reference docs + scripts/check_server_manifest.py pass (manifest drift test green; round-trip test reads each key from TOML and from its env var).
Integration test asserts, with static auth enabled: unauthenticated → 401 + a WWW-Authenticate header carrying the RFC 9728 resource_metadata URL.
Integration test asserts the PRM is served at /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/… with a single authorization_servers entry.
Integration test asserts: valid static token → 200; unknown/invalid token → 401; principal lacking required_scope → 403; token with wrong resource (stub verifier) → 401 at composite.
Integration test asserts session-id replay cannot hijack a principal: a replayed Mcp-Session-Id by a client with no valid token is denied 401.

Unit test asserts composite contract: None → try next; AccessToken with matching resource → accept; verifier that raises → logged/non-acceptance; raising verifier ordered after accepting one is never consulted.
Unit test asserts fail-closed startup: unknown auth_strategies entry, empty composite with auth_enabled=true, and auth_enabled + transport=http with no verifier wired each refuse to start.

Unit test asserts StaticBearerVerifier holds only SHA-256 digests (not plaintext), uses constant-time compare, stamps resource=auth_resource_server_url, and rejects a secrets-file record with a plaintext literal or missing both token_env/token_sha256.
Unit test asserts no token/secret substring appears in emitted logs across the composite raise-handler and a verifier error path.

citation.description: test_http_transport_boots_and_serves_initialize: auth_enabled=False (default), allow_unauthenticated_http=True, no-token HTTP → 200; test_mcp.py exists intact

criteria.criterion: With auth_enabled=false, an integration test (with allow_unauthenticated_http=true) asserts no auth middleware: a no-token HTTP request gets a normal MCP response (not 401), and the stdio suite tests/interfaces/facades/test_mcp.py still passes unchanged.

citation.description: Ticket comment: verified locally (ruff/mypy/6049 tests passed) and CI Gerrit change 716 at https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/716 carries Verified+1 across py3.11/3.12/3.13 + macOS

criteria.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test pass.
